chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-249 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE (S) 1. For orders on M.A. No.6337/2022. 2. For orders on M.A. No.6338/2022. 11.05.2022 Mr. Khair Muhammad Bajeer, Associate of Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Learned counsel on instructions does not press this petition, therefore this application is allowed and the petition is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish*
